name: recoil_state_confirm_quit_on_deactivate
description: RecoilStateConfirmQuit::OnDeactivate disables and tears down the active confirm-quit dialog through the video presentation path, clears ownership, and waits for the dialog exit delay.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_state_confirm_quit_destructors VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x415960 validates the null-dialog early return and, for an active dialog, zVideo::RunPostprocessOnPrimaryBuffer, virtual SetEnabled(0), HudUiDialogController::BlitOwnedSurfaceToPrimary, zVideo::Dispatch_UnlockPrimarySurfaceState, virtual scalar deleting destructor with flags 1, m_dialog clear, and Sleep(1000).

The native smoke patches the video, blit, unlock, and Sleep providers, then verifies the active-dialog path calls SetEnabled(0), blits once, unlocks once, destroys the dialog with flags 1, clears m_dialog, and sleeps for 1000 ms.
The native smoke verifies the null-dialog path returns without video, blit, unlock, or Sleep calls.
